business.headline: EPFO new rule: Members can delink wrong Member IDs from UANThe updated system is expected to reduce confusion caused by duplicate or incorrect provident fund accounts.

IEA slashes oil demand and supply view as Iran war rattles markets: ReportThe ongoing conflict in Iran has forced the IEA to revise global oil market predictions, signalling reduced supply and demand growth amid geopolitical tensions.

SIPs are rising, but is retail conviction in equities slowing? Here's the answerRecord SIP numbers suggest confidence, yet other signals point to caution. Retail investors are not exiting equities — they are simply investing with greater care and clarity.

New TRACES portal launched: How will it change your TDS filing experience?The Income Tax Department has rolled out a new TRACES portal aimed at improving usability and speeding up processes. But how much difference will it actually make to your TDS filing experience?

Earn Rs 12 lakh or Rs 30 lakh? See how your gratuity changes with 50% basic payIn Part 1, we explained how take-home may fall despite the same CTC. Here, we look at how the 50% rule impacts long-term benefits like gratuity.

Unclaimed assets: How to recover your money from banks, shares, EPF and insuranceUnclaimed money is not lost, but recovering it requires awareness, documentation and persistence, making early action crucial before delays and low returns quietly erode its real value over time.

Markets fall, Adani Power hits all-time high: What's driving the surge?Adani Power's rally highlights how strong demand outlook and defensive positioning can drive select stocks higher, even as broader markets struggle with uncertainty and lack of sustained momentum.

From April to March: Here are all the key FY27 tax deadlines you must trackThe tax calendar may seem long, but staying aware of these dates can make things much simpler. Instead of rushing at the last minute, spreading out your compliance and investments across the year can help you avoid stress and penalties.

Gold down over Rs 1,200, silver slips Rs 6,000: Is this a dip worth buying?Precious metals have slipped noticeably, with gold and silver both under pressure. For investors, this raises a familiar dilemma, i.e., is this the right moment to step in or stay on the sidelines?

Motherson clarifies on Noida workers' protest, says driven by misinformationIn a filing to stock exchanges, the company said recent developments reported in the media relate to labour protests in Noida and some other cities, and are not specific to any one company.

Retail inflation rises to 3.40% in March from 3.21% in FebruaryThe year-on-year inflation rate, based on All India Consumer Price Index (CPI), stood at 3.40% (Provisional) in March 2026. This is slightly higher than February's 3.21%, but still below the 4% mark that is often seen as manageable.

8th Pay Commission meetings: Should govt employees expect a pay revision soon?After months of speculation, the 8th Pay Commission process has picked up pace. With meetings now scheduled, the big question remains, i.e., should government employees expect a pay revision anytime soon?

Sensex ends 700 points lower, Nifty below 23,900; auto stocks hit hardMarkets may have steadied after early losses, but rising oil prices and geopolitical risks continue to cloud sentiment, keeping investors cautious and leaving the near-term outlook uncertain and volatile.

Maruti, Eicher Motors, other auto stocks tumble: What's behind the fall?Maruti Suzuki fell over 4%, while Eicher Motors dropped nearly 5%, making them among the top losers on the Nifty 50. Other auto names also saw weakness, even as the broader market pared some of its early losses.

Ambanis lead Asia's 10 richest families in 2026: Check who else is on the listAt number one is the Ambani family, with a net worth of about $89.7 billion. Their flagship company, Reliance Industries, continues to expand across energy, telecom, retail and financial services.

When employers evade, enforcement looks awaySystemic gaps in enforcement, coupled with deliberate non-compliance, leave workers outside legal protection, raising a larger question: whether labour laws exist merely on paper or are meant to be enforced.

New labour codes explained: How your salary, PF, and gratuity will changeEmployees should ask four key questions: What's my actual wage base? Is PF on capped or full wages? Is this just a salary split change? And am I gaining long-term benefits?

Sensex pares losses by more than 800 points, Nifty recovers from early crashStock market crash: The recovery follows a steep fall at the open, when the Sensex had plunged over 1,600 points and the Nifty slipped below key levels in early trade, reflecting a weak start to the week.

DA hike coming: How much will your monthly pay rise-Rs 360, Rs 540 or more?As the DA hike nears, expectations are building. Even a modest increase can add a steady boost to your salary, but how much can you really expect this time? Let's have a look.

Jyoti CNC shares tumble up to 16%: What's behind the sharp fall?The sharp fall follows reports that French authorities have initiated a judicial probe into the company's subsidiary, Huron Graffenstaden SAS, over alleged violations linked to export control norms.

entertainment.headline: Huma Qureshi recalls when Ed Sheeran called Gangs of Wasseypur really cool Huma Qureshi recently shared a delightful encounter with global star Ed Sheeran, who praised the Indian cult classic Gangs of Wasseypur. The British singer expressed his admiration for Indian cinema and culture.

Ahaan Panday to reunite with Saiyaara director Mohit Suri Ahaan Panday is reportedly set to reunite with director Mohit Suri for a new romantic drama backed by Yash Raj Films after the success of Saiyaara. The project is said to be in development, with the script being reworked and filming expected to begin later this year.

Not happening soon: Tejasswi Prakash dismisses wedding rumours with Karan Kundrra Tejasswi Prakash has clarified that there are no immediate plans to marry her partner Karan Kundrra, putting recent rumours to rest. The duo began dating after appearing together on Bigg Boss 15.

Alia-Ranbir are on a dreamy anniversary vacation in snow with Raha: Video and pics Alia Bhatt shared glimpses of her serene snowy vacation with Ranbir Kapoor and daughter Raha on the couple's fourth wedding anniversary. The dreamy visuals of snow-covered landscapes and family moments quickly captured attention online.

Vijay receives wedding pic with Sangeetha from fan amid divorce. Watch his reaction Thalapathy Vijay is actively campaigning across Tamil Nadu as he prepares for his party's first assembly election. At a rally, a fan gifted a photo frame of Vijay and Sangeetha along with Vijayakanth.

Who is Juhi Bhatt? All about Ranveer Allahbadia's partner and influencer Ranveer Allahbadia has confirmed his relationship with content creator Juhi Bhatt during an IPL outing. The couple's appearance at the MI vs RCB match quickly caught social media's attention.

Is Hanumankind collaborating with BTS label HYBE? Here's what we know Indian rapper Hanumankind sparked collaboration buzz after attending BTS' concert in Seoul and interacting with HYBE chairman Bang Si-hyuk. While talks with HYBE Corporation are still at an early stage, a potential collaboration with its newer K-pop groups is being explored.

Not that Lewis: Singer Lewis Capaldi linked to Kim Kardashian at Coachella, reacts Singer Lewis Capaldi had a laugh over a Coachella mix-up after being mistaken for Lewis Hamilton. The confusion began when a fan account incorrectly identified him as Kim Kardashian's date in a viral video.

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai teaser and Varun Dhawan's return to romance. Watch Varun Dhawan returns to his signature romantic-comedy space with Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The teaser hints at a lively love triangle set in a vibrant, high-energy world.

Pak pulls up TV channel for Asha Bhosle songs. But Dhurandhar 2 tops its Spotify A tribute to Asha Bhosle triggered regulatory action in Pakistan, with the government citing a ban on Indian content on television. Yet Indian songs continue to trend on streaming platforms like Spotify, exposing a paradox between broadcast restrictions and digital access.

Kendall Jenner and Jacob Elordi: Coachella vibes or something more? Coachella is buzzing with fresh whispers around Kendall Jenner and Jacob Elordi, and the chatter is hard to ignore. The duo was reportedly seen getting cosy at an after-party over the weekend.

Ramayana against Dune 3, The Odyssey? Producer Namit says world wants freshness Namit Malhotra explains why Ramayana stands out in a year packed with global epics like Dune 3 and The Odyssey. The filmmaker believes the story offers something fresh for worldwide audiences.

Vijay might do a film for Jana Nayagan makers to offset losses amid leak, delay Reports suggest that actor Vijay is likely to do one more film with KVN Productions to compensate Jana Nayagan losses caused by piracy and delays. The leak occurred amid Tamil Nadu elections, sparking industry outrage and arrests.

Nicole Kidman on why she's learning to become a death doula Actor Nicole Kidman has revealed she is training as a death doula. She shared how her mother's death shaped the decision, which may seem unusual.

Assi OTT release: When and where to watch Taapsee Pannu's hard-hitting drama Taapsee Pannu's courtroom drama Assi, directed by Anubhav Sinha, is set for its OTT release after its theatrical run earlier this year.

Samay Raina open to collab with Ranveer Allahbadia after 'Kaun Samay' dig Comedian Samay Raina is making a strong comeback with his special Still Alive and is open to collaborating again with Ranveer Allahbadia despite past controversies.

Nobody supported Dhurandhar: Kunal Kohli on 'biggest directors' expecting it to fail Director Kunal Kohli revealed how top filmmakers doubted Dhurandhar: The Revenge and expected it to falter after its opening weekend. The film, however, flipped the narrative with a surprising box office surge.

Asha Bhosle beyond Bollywood: Her gems from the South that are not to be missed Asha Bhosle's contribution to Indian music is immeasurable. The legend, who died on April 12, is best known for her iconic tracks in Bollywood. However, she also delivered unforgettable hits in South Indian cinema.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 26: Collections show major drop in 4th week worldwide Dhurandhar 2 sees a noticeable dip as it enters its fourth week at the box office. Despite the slowdown, the Ranveer Singh-starrer continues its record-breaking global run.

general news.headline: Samrat Choudhary to be Bihar's first BJP Chief Minister as Nitish Kumar era ends Live UpdatesThe BJP leader expressed his gratitude to the party for bestowing the opportunity to serve the people of Bihar as the next Chief Minister.

Lok Sabha strength to rise from 543 to 850, setting stage for women's reservationThe government has shared the draft bill with MPs ahead of a likely push to amend the Constitution. If implemented, the new Lok Sabha will comprise 850 members, up from its current strength of 543.

Sanctioned Chinese ship sails through Trump's Hormuz blockade, Iran taunts USA Chinese tanker became one of the first ships to make its way through the Strait of Hormuz after the US military began a blockade of Iran's ports. The incident was used by Iran to mock Trump.

Trump eyeing key trade route vital to India as Hormuz burns?All eyes are on the Strait of Hormuz as the US flexes its military muscle to enforce a blockade on Iranian ports. However, a hush-hush meeting between the US defence secretary and his Indonesian counterpart has set off fresh speculation. Is Donald Trump now turning his focus toward another vital chokepoint closer to India?

Why Trump the Christ has opened a war front against Pope LeoAmid the war on Iran, US President Donald Trump has attacked Pope Leo XIV, calling him "weak on crime" and "terrible for foreign policy". But why is Trump, who faced backlash for projecting himself as Jesus Christ, attacking the Pope, the leader of more than half of the world's Christians?

Xi Jinping offers 4-point peace proposal for US-Iran war after Pak talks derailXi Jinping floated a four-point proposal for lasting peace in the region during Abu Dhabi Crown Prince Sheikh Khaled bin Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan's visit to Beijing.

Rs 2,000 for women, 3 LPG cylinders annually headline BJP's Tamil Nadu manifestoJP Nadda said it was "auspicious" to unveil the manifesto on Tamil New Year and noted that the day also marks the 150th birth anniversary of BR Ambedkar. He said Tamil Nadu represents "the cradle of the world's oldest civilisation" and expressed pride in its cultural legacy, invoking figures such as Thiruvalluvar and Subramania Bharati.

WhatsApp groups, QR codes, call centre-like ops: How Noida protests were plannedNoida witnessed large-scale, and at times violent, protests over wage hike demands, with police arresting nearly 400 people so far.

Nitish Kumar's flip-flop formula for power in Bihar: 10 oaths, 6 resignationsNitish Kumar's unmatched record of 10 swearing-ins and 6 resignations tells a deeper story of shifting alliances, power strategy, and Bihar's evolving politics, but what drives this repeated cycle of exits and comebacks?

Live: 'Bring chilli powder' chats, audio point to planned escalation in Noida protestsNoida Labour Protest Live Updates: Fresh protests erupted across Noida on Tuesday, as workers demanding higher wages clashed with police, with some protesters also throwing stones at police vehicles. After initial investigation, police said that Monday's violent workers' protest appeared to have been carefully coordinated rather than spontaneous, with evidence suggesting the use of multiple digital platforms including social media accounts, WhatsApp groups, and a suspected call centre-like setup to mobilise and incite participants. Authorities, while continuing their investigation and having arrested around 400 people so far, indicated that a network of organised actors may have been actively encouraging unrest by rapidly creating fake online profiles and pushing inflammatory content. Meanwhile, the Uttar Pradesh government has increased interim minimum wages for unskilled, semi-skilled and skilled workers. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

How US is choking Iran through Hormuz blockade and at what costThe blockade is a calculated attempt by President Donald Trump to squeeze Iran's economy at its core by cutting off oil exports, one of its last major sources of revenue and leverage.

BBC presenter Amol Rajan plans to move back to India: History not being made in UKIndia-born BBC presenter Amol Rajan voiced deep worries about England's future, saying the country no longer felt like a place where history was being made. In a podcast, he revealed that he was thinking of moving back to India, which he described as having extraordinary energy and growing rapidly.

Sleeping 9 hours but still tired? Alia Bhatt–Sadhguru chat puts focus on sleepFor years, 8 hours of sleep has been seen as the gold standard for good health. But many, including Alia Bhatt, say even 9 hours sometimes doesn't feel enough.

Live: Class 10 results on April 14? Create DigiLocker accountCBSE Board Class 10 Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education is expected to release the Class 10 results today. Once declared, students can check their results on cbseresults.nic.in, cbse.gov.in, and results.cbse.nic.in using their roll number and date of birth. Marksheets will also be available on DigiLocker and the UMANG App.

Telugu speech therapist in UK fails to understand patients' English, gets firedAn Indian-origin speech and language therapist was fired from her job in the UK after failing to communicate and understand patients' English. The therapist claimed English as her first language and got her job, but was quickly caught for her lack of English proficiency.

Mother sold jewellery to buy him shoes, Bihar's Sakib Hussain is now an IPL starIPL 2026: From selling jewellery for shoes to shining on the IPL stage, Sakib Hussain's journey hits hard. His four-wicket debut for SRH is more than a performance, it is a story of belief finally paying off.

Samay Raina's therapist suggested box breathing for anxiety: How does it work?When comic Samay Raina called his therapist and said he was feeling anxious, she didn't immediately suggest medication, but simply asked him to do box breathing.

How Samrat Choudhary was picked as Bihar CM: Inside details of key meetThe BJP named Samrat Choudhary as Bihar's next Chief Minister, marking the first time the party will hold the top post in the state. The decision ends days of speculation after Nitish Kumar was elected to the Rajya Sabha and stepped down as Chief Minister.

Only 2 hours 53 mins of work in 8-hour day? Study lists major office distractionsA survey of UK office workers has found that the average employee is productive for just 2 hours and 53 minutes daily. Social media, news browsing, and conversations top the list of distractions, raising questions about how modern workdays are actually spent.

Volkswagen Taigun facelift launched, price starts at Rs 10.99 lakhVolkswagen India has launched the updated Volkswagen Taigun with refreshed styling, new features, and an 8-speed automatic, while retaining its turbo-petrol engines, priced from Rs 10.99 lakh.

Younger Indians without diabetes lose weight faster on GLP-1 shotsAs GLP-1-based drugs gain ground in India, age, diabetes status, and drug choice could shape who benefits most – and how quickly results appear.

Live: Pakistan backchannel continues, no clarity on next US-Iran talksUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The unfolding crisis in the Strait of Hormuz marks a dangerous escalation in already fragile US-Iran relations, with a sweeping American naval blockade of Iranian ports taking effect at 7:30 IST. President Donald Trump has threated that Iran wants a deal "very badly" and revealing that he was contacted by the "appropriate people" seeking negotiations, even as he warned that any Iranian "fast attack ships" approaching the blockade "will be immediately ELIMINATED". The blockade follows failed weekend talks in Pakistan, where both sides blamed each other for the collapse, with the US citing Iran's refusal to abandon its nuclear ambitions and Tehran accusing Washington of "maximalism, shifting goalposts and blockade", further deepening mistrust. Meanwhile, Iran has rejected the move outright, calling restrictions on maritime movement an illegal act, while its leadership has signalled it will not surrender under threats. On the ground, the situation remains tense, with Iran's armed forces placed on maximum combat alert. The ripple effects are already visible, as oil prices surge past $100 per barrel. France, United Kingdom and European Union called for efforts to restore freedom of navigation in one of the world's most critical trade routes. At the same time, ongoing exchanges of attacks between the Israeli military and Hezbollah in Lebanon have stalled diplomatic efforts. Some US officals inducted that as of now diplomatic channels remain strained but not entirely closed. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

Pak pulls up TV channel for Asha Bhosle songs. But Dhurandhar 2 tops its SpotifyA tribute to Asha Bhosle triggered regulatory action in Pakistan, with the government citing a ban on Indian content on television. Yet Indian songs continue to trend on streaming platforms like Spotify, exposing a paradox between broadcast restrictions and digital access.
Strait of Hormuz is not social media: Iran roasts Trump for blocking its portsIran shared a post on X, mocking Donald Trump for blocking its ports in the Strait of Hormuz amid the ongoing conflict.

sports.headline: Shane Warne's son blames Covid vaccine for Australia legend's death Shane Warne's son Jackson said the "three or four" COVID-19 vaccine doses his father was "forced to take for work" may have contributed to his death, speaking on the '2 Worlds Collide' podcast.

Is Suryakumar Yadav losing ground? India's UK tour may define batter's next phase Suryakumar Yadav faces scrutiny over his batting form despite leading India to T20 World Cup success, with questions over his long-term role ahead of the 2028 Olympics. The upcoming UK tour will be crucial, as consistency with the bat could determine his future in India's plans.

Pat Cummins to likely join Sunrisers Hyderabad on April 17 Pat Cummins is expected to return to India by April 17 after a fitness test in Australia, which will determine whether he can rejoin Sunrisers Hyderabad for the ongoing IPL season. He has been recovering from a back injury since last July, and if cleared, he could be available for their next match on April 18, boosting their pace attack.

Ben Stokes rubbishes rift rumours with Brendon McCullum: Massive overstatement Ben Stokes dismissed rift rumours with Brendon McCullum, insisting their partnership remains strong despite England's Ashes setback. He stressed that differences are healthy, with honest discussions helping them stay aligned and work towards the same goal.

Riyan Parag all style, does nothing else in IPL: Ex-India captain blasts RR skipper IPL 2026: Former India captain Kris Srikkanth tore into Riyan Parag's tactical calls and poor batting in Rajasthan Royals' heavy defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday. Young pacers Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain shone for the hosts in Hyderabad.

PCB bans Blessing Muzarabani for ditching Pak league and playing IPL The Pakistan Cricket Board has handed a 2-year ban to Zimbabwe pacer Blessing Muzarabani from the PSL after he made a last-minute switch to play in the IPL.

Sanju Samson beats Jasprit Bumrah to win ICC award for T20 World Cup heroics Sanju Samson's T20 World Cup brilliance has earned him ICC's top monthly honour. From bench to match-winner, his rise defined India's title-winning campaign.

The New Year Derby: CSK and KKR fight to avoid a festive hangover IPL 2026, CSK vs KKR: A struggling Kolkata Knight Riders side heads to Chennai to take on the Super Kings, who are riding momentum after a win against the Delhi Capitals. Can CSK make it two in two?

Mother sold jewellery to buy him shoes, Bihar's Sakib Hussain is now an IPL star IPL 2026: From selling jewellery for shoes to shining on the IPL stage, Sakib Hussain's journey hits hard. His four-wicket debut for SRH is more than a performance, it is a story of belief finally paying off.

Chepauk waits: Will MS Dhoni finally take the field for CSK against KKR? IPL 2026, CSK vs KKR: MS Dhoni has been training with the Chennai Super Kings after being ruled out of the first two weeks of the season due to a calf injury. Will he feature in Tuesday's home game against the Kolkata Knight Riders in Chennai?

Disrespectful: Star athlete blasts delay in National Sports Awards announcement The National Sports Awards have been delayed this year, with reports suggesting that the government is considering a re-evaluation of the nomination process to ensure that only the most deserving athletes are honoured. Tejaswin Shankar is among the 24 athletes recommended for the Arjuna Award.

How Aaron, Praful Hinge's plan trapped Sooryavanshi and sparked RR collapseIPL 2026: One clear plan, one early wicket, and the game flipped instantly in SRH's favour. Varun Aaron and Praful Hinge's strategy to dismiss Sooryavanshi set up a collapse RR never recovered from.

Sooryavanshi's India debut loading? 15-year-old in talks for Ireland seriesIPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's IPL rise could soon fast-track him into India colours. With selectors watching closely, the 15-year-old now reportedly stands on the brink of a historic international debut.

4 wickets, 181k followers: Praful Hinge's IPL debut night breaks the internetIPL 2026: Praful Hinge turned his debut into a viral moment with a record-breaking spell. The SRH pacer's four-wicket burst not only dismantled RR but also saw his Instagram following explode from 4K to 185K overnight.

IPL Play Of The Day: Hinge swipes left on RR after baiting them into temptationsIPL 2026: Praful Hinge decided to swipe right on SRH's request and decided to bait the RR batters into giving away their wickets and ghost them in the end. Hinge finished with four wickets for 34 runs in his spell, helping Hyderabad claim their second win of the season.

SRH vs RR: Riyan Parag explains not using Ravindra Jadeja to bowl at HyderabadRiyan Parag called the decision to not bowl Ravindra Jadeja a split second call, even as the all rounder impressed with 45 runs off his bat in RR's loss to SRH in IPL 2026.

Ishan Kishan considers ditching gloves to focus on his captaincy for SRHIshan Kishan hinted he may give up wicketkeeping duties to focus on captaincy, saying better communication with bowlers could improve SRH's on-field execution in IPL 2026.

Art of manifestation: How Praful Hinge called Sooryavanshi's scalp in SRH vs RRPraful Hinge revealed how he planned the wicket of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi well ahead of the SRH vs RR clash at the Uppal on Monday, April 13. Hinge picked up four wickets to rock the RR batting order and hand SRH their second win of the season.

Debutants Praful Hinge, Sakib Hussain stun RR as SRH's youth gamble hits jackpotSRH's youth gamble pays off as debutants Praful Hinge and Sakib Hussain dismantle RR, with Ishan Kishan's 91 leading a dominant 57 run win in IPL 2026.

Who is Praful Hinge? Nagpur pacer on IPL debut takes 3 wickets in 1st overPraful Hinge struck three wickets in his first IPL over, ripping through RR's top order and giving SRH a dream start in a stunning debut performance.

RR manager Romi Bhinder issued show-cause by BCCI for using phone in dugoutBCCI's Anti Corruption and Security Unit has asked Rajasthan Royals manager Romi Bhinder to explain his mobile phone use in the dugout during an IPL match, with a 24 hour deadline set for clarification.

Replace him with Sooryavanshi for India: Fans slam Abhishek after duck vs RRFans called for Abhishek Sharma to be axed from the Indian T20I setup and replace him with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in the side. Abhishek was dismissed for a first-ball duck during the match at Uppal.

SRH vs RR Playing XIs: Pretorious, Hinge headline shake-up for Uppal showdownSRH vs RR: Both teams ring in major changes with three debutants set to feature, including Pretorious, Hinge and Sakib, as Rajasthan opt to bowl first in their IPL clash in Hyderabad.

Will Varun be ready for CSK clash? KKR provides update ahead of Chepauk tieKolkata Knight Riders have provided an update on the fitness of Varun Chakravarthy ahead of their clash against the Chennai Super Kings on Tuesday, April 14. Varun has been out of action for the last two games for KKR.

IPL 2026: GT vs CSK fixtures swapped due to Ahmedabad civic pollsThe Board of Control for Cricket in India has tweaked the Indian Premier League schedule, swapping fixtures between Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings due to civic polls in Gujarat.

Ghanaian footballer killed in team bus after armed robbery attackA Ghanian footballer, Dominic Frimpong was shot dead after armed robbers attacked the team bus in Ghana. The incident has raised fresh concerns over player safety during domestic travel.

After reclaiming No.1 spot, Jannik Sinner sets sight on French Open gloryJannik Sinner has set his sights on winning the French Open title after going past Carlos Alcaraz to become the new World No.1 in tennis. Sinner defeated Alcaraz at the Monte Carlo Masters on Sunday to climb to the top spot.

Two Indian sports, cricket, and hockey, will be at 2030 CWG: Sports MinisterSports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya on Monday said the 2030 Commonwealth Games in Ahmedabad are likely to feature two indigenous Indian sports, with cricket and hockey confirmed as part of the programme.

Tim David punished for disobeying umpires' instruction; Hardik Pandya reprimandedTim David was fined 25 per cent of his match fees for ignoring the umpire's instructions in the first innings of the MI vs RCB clash. Meanwhile, Hardik Pandya has also been fined for slow over-rate.

SRH missing Cummins captaincy: Zaheer Khan slams interim skipper Ishan KishanZaheer Khan slammed Ishan Kishan's stint as the interim captain of SRH, claiming that the team is missing the presence of Pat Cummins in the side. Kishan has taken over as the interim captain till Cummins returns.

Hockey: Sports Ministry, Fulton differ on India's plans for Asiad, World CupSports Ministry pushes for separate squads for Asian Games and World Cup to avoid burnout, but coaches prefer sending full-strength teams to both events.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
